title: D2 DLQ failure-metadata spec
description: Schema for contracts/dlq-failure-metadata/dlq-failure-metadata.spec.json — the source-of-truth catalog of (a) JSON property-name constants for the DlqFailureMetadata record and (b) closed-enum string values for the failure-cause taxonomy. DcsvIo.D2.Messaging.DlqMetadata.SourceGen dispatches multi-target: the fields catalog emits DlqFailureMetadataFields into DcsvIo.D2.Messaging.Abstractions; the causes catalog emits DlqFailureCauses into DcsvIo.D2.Messaging.RabbitMq. the TypeScript codegen pipeline emits both into @dcsv-io/d2-messaging-abstractions.

fields.description: Property-name constants for the DlqFailureMetadata record.

constName.description: Public C# / TS constant identifier — UPPER_SNAKE_CASE. Must be unique across the fields catalog.

value.description: Wire-format JSON property name. Must be unique across the fields catalog.

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.

constName.description: Public C# / TS constant identifier — UPPER_SNAKE_CASE. Must be unique across the causes catalog.

value.description: Wire-format cause string. Must be unique across the causes catalog.

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.
